codeReview.summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit d9bd980. The implementation matches the feature description and expectedBehavior: generation option gating now depends on empty local discovery plus supported mode, gist/ssh/gpg generation routes behave as required, malformed gist-list rows are ignored safely, passphrase-protected SSH keys are screened via a 2s dry check to avoid hangs, and deterministic SSH-first auto-setup ordering is preserved.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission boundary guidance is overly narrow/ambiguous for this feature: it marks signing/discovery.py as off-limits except for remote-state classification, but this feature contract explicitly requires gist parsing hardening and SSH key usability checks in discovery logic.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/yasyf/.factory/missions/c3c5e3fe-2fb5-4733-9f3a-5ae91c0f3321/AGENTS.md:26 vs feature requirements in features.json for generation-paths-and-boundary-handling; commit d9bd980 modifies client/cc_sentiment/signing/discovery.py accordingly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validator lint scope in services.yaml does not include files touched by this feature outside TUI paths, which can miss regressions when mission features legitimately modify discovery/signing tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-sentiment/.factory/services.yaml:28 lints only cc_sentiment/tui and tests/test_tui.py, while commit d9bd980 changes client/cc_sentiment/signing/discovery.py and client/tests/test_signing.py.

summary: Feature generation-paths-and-boundary-handling passes review: expected generation routing and boundary hardening behaviors are implemented and covered by targeted tests in the diff, with no blocking or non-blocking code defects identified.
